entries.name: Founder Idea Prompt
entries.description: One-sentence product idea submitted by a Founder to seed spec generation.

entries.name: Existing Codebase Read Stream
entries.description: Read-only source-tree contents pulled from a customer's VCS for scope inference.

entries.name: Draft Spec
entries.description: Working-draft PRD/spec emitted by F.2 Generate Spec, consumed by F.3 Review.

entries.name: Review Decision
entries.description: Approve/revise decision emitted by a human reviewer at F.3.

entries.name: Approved Spec
entries.description: Approved, immutable spec snapshot handed off to F.4 CLI emitter.

entries.name: CLI Bundle
entries.description: Emitted CLI command bundle + SKILL.md + CLAUDE.md + MCP tool exports.

entries.name: Customer System Connection Manifest
entries.description: Connection config (read-only credentials) for a customer system being observed by F.5.

entries.name: Live Performance Metrics Stream
entries.description: Availability, throughput, latency samples streamed from customer observability tools.

entries.name: Tech Catalog + Vendor Docs
entries.description: Tech-registry profiles + vendor docs + cloud SLAs feeding the recommendation engine.

entries.name: Design Recommendation
entries.description: Traced recommendation (with citations) emitted by F.7 back to spec pipeline.

entries.name: Audit Event
entries.description: Append-only event emitted by every state-mutating function per CC.R02.

entries.name: Session Token
entries.description: Authenticated session token emitted by IDP, consumed by F.1 (authenticate).

entries.name: LLM Completion
entries.description: Model completion returned from an LLM provider to an agent workflow.

entries.name: Compliance Policy
entries.description: Compliance rulebook (SOC2/HIPAA/GDPR/PCI-DSS) applied at review and emit gates.

entries.name: Spec Commit
entries.description: Approved spec written as an artifact commit to a VCS remote.

coverage_notes: 15 DE entries cover the 5 performance criteria nodes in scope_tree (availability, throughput, latency, auditability, non-invasiveness).
DE.02 and DE.07 flagged critical + pii_class=sensitive per UC11 non-invasiveness constraint.
DE.08 is the metric-stream backbone feeding the feedback loop; its encryption-at-rest requirement reflects retention policy (EC18).
No DE resolves to 'external' sentinel in v1 — all edges terminate in a scope_tree node or named context_diagram actor.

entries.name: LLM Completion
entries.description: Model completion returned from an LLM provider to an agent workflow.

entries.name: Compliance Policy
entries.description: Compliance rulebook (SOC2/HIPAA/GDPR/PCI-DSS) applied at review and emit gates.

entries.name: Spec Commit
entries.description: Approved spec written as an artifact commit to a VCS remote.

coverage_notes: 15 DE entries cover the 5 performance criteria nodes in scope_tree (availability, throughput, latency, auditability, non-invasiveness).
DE.02 and DE.07 flagged critical + pii_class=sensitive per UC11 non-invasiveness constraint.
DE.08 is the metric-stream backbone feeding the feedback loop; its encryption-at-rest requirement reflects retention policy (EC18).
No DE resolves to 'external' sentinel in v1 — all edges terminate in a scope_tree node or named context_diagram actor.

entries.name: Founder Idea Prompt
entries.description: One-sentence product idea submitted by a Founder to seed spec generation.

entries.name: Existing Codebase Read Stream
entries.description: Read-only source-tree contents pulled from a customer's VCS for scope inference.

entries.name: Draft Spec
entries.description: Working-draft PRD/spec emitted by F.2 Generate Spec, consumed by F.3 Review.

entries.name: Review Decision
entries.description: Approve/revise decision emitted by a human reviewer at F.3.

entries.name: Approved Spec
entries.description: Approved, immutable spec snapshot handed off to F.4 CLI emitter.

entries.name: CLI Bundle
entries.description: Emitted CLI command bundle + SKILL.md + CLAUDE.md + MCP tool exports.

entries.name: Customer System Connection Manifest
entries.description: Connection config (read-only credentials) for a customer system being observed by F.5.

coverage_notes: 15 DE entries cover the 5 performance criteria nodes in scope_tree (availability, throughput, latency, auditability, non-invasiveness).
